official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the clear_titles packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, writing, and observing the clear_titles resetTimes boolean body.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound clear_titles frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official ClientboundClearTitlesPacket(boolean) constructor with resetTimes=true. This is a smallest context-free fixture and does not require initialized client title state, screen, Level, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound clear_titles packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official resetTimes=true boolean fixture only; do not infer title UI clearing behavior, title timing reset behavior, initialized client screen/title state, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
